scripts.build:flasm: make -C tools/flasm-src && mkdir -p tools/flasm-bin && cp tools/flasm-src/flasm tools/flasm-src/flasm.ini tools/flasm-bin/
scripts.build:timelines: node scripts/build-asset-timeline.mjs A-tour && node scripts/build-asset-timeline.mjs intro && node scripts/build-asset-timeline.mjs nav && node scripts/build-asset-timeline.mjs segment1 && node scripts/build-asset-timeline.mjs segment2 && node scripts/build-asset-timeline.mjs segment3 && node scripts/build-asset-timeline.mjs segment4 && node scripts/build-asset-timeline.mjs segment5
scripts.convert: npm run extract && npm run build:flasm && npm run build:timelines && npm run build:control-flow && npm run build:secondary-cli && npm run optimize:generated
scripts.convert:player: npm run extract && npm run build:flasm && npm run build:timelines && npm run build:control-flow && npm run build:secondary-cli && npm run optimize:player-generated
scripts.convert:tree-player: npm run extract && npm run build:flasm && npm run build:timelines && npm run build:control-flow && npm run build:secondary-cli && npm run optimize:tree-player-generated
